about.title: About Chair Location
about.intro: Chair Location is a website and mobile app where you can search, find, and reserve coworking spaces, private offices, meeting rooms, and virtual offices in Jeddah near you.
about.worksDescription: Chair Location is a platform designed to connect individuals and businesses looking for flexible workspaces with providers of these spaces. Think of it as a digital marketplace where you can browse, compare, and book the space that perfectly suits your needs.

search.label: Search
search.text: Start by searching for the right type of workspace in Jeddah.

compare.label: Browse and Compare
compare.text: Compare the available spaces and the features that matter most to you.

book.label: Book
book.text: Reserve the workspace with a simple and direct booking flow.

freelancers.label: Freelancers and Entrepreneurs
freelancers.text: Who need a professional work environment away from home.

startups.label: Startups
startups.text: Looking for flexibility and lower operational costs compared to traditional offices.

smallTeams.label: Small Teams
smallTeams.text: Who need a place to meet or work on specific projects.

travelers.label: Business Travelers
travelers.text: Who require a place to work while in Jeddah.

about.summary: In short, Chair Location acts as a bridge, quickly and easily connecting you to the space you need to work effectively in Jeddah.

reasons.amenities: We Offer All Amenities in Every Location

coworking.title: Chair Location Coworking Space For You
coworking.description: Chair Location Coworking space offers you the freedom to work closer to clients, colleagues or home. It's also greener and more cost-effective. With over 40 luxury offices, nobody is better placed than Chair Location to help you make the best of it.
